channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [EUROPRATIK] Euro Pratik Sales: Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
Euro Pratik Sales Ltd has announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved these results at a meeting held on May 12, 2026. The meeting also addressed a fine imposed by NSE and BSE for non-compliance regarding the short notice of a record date for interim dividend payment, which the company has already paid.

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Unmodified audit opinion issued by CNK & Associates LLP and Monika Jain & Co.
  • Fine of ₹10,000 paid for short notice on interim dividend record date.
  • Board meeting commenced at 5:30 p.m. and concluded at 8.30 p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Euro Pratik Sales Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [LOTUSDEV] Sri Lotus Developers FY26 Revenue at ₹769 Crs, Up 40% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Ltd reported strong FY26 results, with revenue reaching ₹769 Crs, a 40% year-over-year increase. Q4 revenue stood at ₹308 Crs, up 62% YoY. The company's EBITDA margin was 39.4% for Q4 and 36.5% for FY26. Profit after tax (PAT) for Q4 was ₹101 Crs and ₹243 Crs for FY26, a 7% YoY increase. Pre-sales surged to ₹1,157 Crs, growing 137% YoY. The company anticipates pre-sales of ₹1,800–2,000 Crs for FY27 and maintains a net debt-free status.

  • FY26 Revenue reached ₹769 Crs, a 40% YoY increase.
  • Pre-sales surged to ₹1,157 Crs, growing 137% YoY.
  • Q4 revenue was ₹308 Crs, up 62% YoY.
  • FY26 PAT increased 7% YoY to ₹243 Crs.
  • FY27 Pre-Sales Guidance of ₹1,800–2,000 Crs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ELIL] Logica Infoway Appoints Punit Pandey as Internal Auditor
item.description:
Logica Infoway Ltd has appointed Punit Pandey & Associates, Chartered Accountants (FRN: 333246E), as their Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. The appointment was approved by the Board of Directors on May 12, 2026, following the recommendation of the Audit Committee. This decision complies with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Punit Pandey & Associates appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Appointment approved by the Board on May 12, 2026.
  • The decision follows the Audit Committee's recommendation.
  • Appointment complies with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Eastern Logica Infoway Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Thomas Cook India: Chandran Ratnaswami Retires
item.description:
Thomas Cook (India) Ltd announced the retirement of Non-Executive Director, Mr. Chandran Ratnaswami, at the upcoming 49th Annual General Meeting (AGM). Mr. Ratnaswami expressed his desire not to seek re-appointment due to other commitments within the Fairfax Group. The Board accepted his request and recommended that his reappointment not be sought at the AGM. Additionally, the Board recommended the re-appointment of Mr. Sumit Maheshwari, a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director, who is retiring by rotation at the AGM and has offered himself for re-appointment. The 49th AGM will be held on September 10, 2026, and the book closure will be from August 28, 2026, to September 10, 2026, for dividend payment purposes.

  • Chandran Ratnaswami retires as Non-Executive Director, not seeking re-appointment.
  • Sumit Maheshwari recommended for re-appointment as Non-Executive Non-Independent Director.
  • 49th AGM scheduled for September 10, 2026.
  • Book closure from August 28, 2026, to September 10, 2026, for dividend payment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [BLISSGVS] Bliss GVS Pharma Recommends 100% Final Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Bliss GVS Pharma Ltd's board has recommended a final dividend of 100%, which is ₹1 per equity share on a face value of ₹1 each, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This recommendation is subject to the approval of shareholders at the company's upcoming 41st Annual General Meeting (AGM). The 41st AGM is scheduled for July 15, 2026, and will be held via video conferencing. The board meeting, where this decision was made, took place on May 12, 2026, and also approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the same period.

  • Bliss GVS Pharma recommends a final dividend of 100% (₹1 per share) for FY26.
  • Dividend approval is subject to shareholder approval at the 41st AGM.
  • The 41st AGM will be held on July 15, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • BDO India Services re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26 approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLISS GVS PHARMA LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [CFEL] Confidence Futuristic Energetech Board Meeting on May 16, 2026
item.description:
Confidence Futuristic Energetech Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 16, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone & consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider and recommend the final dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 16, 2026.
  • Consideration of audited financial results for FY26.
  • Discussion and recommendation of final dividend for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Confidence Futuristic Energetech Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Thomas Cook India Recommends ₹0.50 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Thomas Cook (India) Ltd's Board of Directors has recommended a final dividend of ₹0.50 per equity share of Re. 1 each for the financial year 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The board also approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board meeting commenced at 17:30 hours and the results were approved at 18:30 hours.

  • Thomas Cook India recommends a final dividend of ₹0.50 per share.
  • Dividend payout is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 were approved.
  • Auditor's report has an unmodified opinion on financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [TMCV] Tata Motors Incorporates Teesta Renewable Energy as Associate
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tata Motors Ltd has incorporated a Special Purpose Vehicle, Teesta Renewable Energy Private Limited (TREPL), on May 12, 2026. Tata Motors holds 26% equity shareholding in TREPL, making it an associate of the company. TREPL will focus on power generation, including solar and wind, and the captive generation and sale of electrical energy. The initial capital subscription was in cash, with shares subscribed at par value.

  • Tata Motors incorporates Teesta Renewable Energy Private Limited (TREPL) as an associate.
  • Tata Motors holds 26% equity shareholding in TREPL.
  • TREPL will focus on power generation, including solar and wind energy.
  • The incorporation involves an initial capital subscription in cash at par value.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tata Motors Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [BLISSGVS] Bliss GVS Pharma Reappoints Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27
item.description:
Bliss GVS Pharma Ltd. has re-appointed M/s. BDO India Services Private Limited as its Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. This decision was made during the Board Meeting held on May 12, 2026, where the board also approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of 100%, i.e., ₹1 per equity share, subject to shareholder approval. The 41st Annual General Meeting is scheduled for July 15, 2026, via video conferencing.

  • M/s. BDO India Services re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Final dividend of 100% (₹1 per share) recommended for FY 2026, pending shareholder approval.
  • 41st AGM scheduled for July 15, 2026, via video conferencing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLISS GVS PHARMA LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [INDSOYA] Indsoya Board Meeting on May 15, 2026 to Consider Financial Results
item.description:
Indsoya Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 15, 2026, to consider and approve several key items. These include the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, the resignation of Non-Executive Director Mr. James Mody, and the appointment of Mr. Amol Nirungkar as an Independent Director. The board will also consider changes in designations for Ms. Lovely Ghanshyam Mutreja and Mr. Kirit Ghanshyam Mutreja, as well as the remuneration for the Managing Director.

  • Board to consider FY26 audited financial results.
  • Resignation of Mr. James Mody as Non-Executive Director to be approved.
  • Appointment of Mr. Amol Nirungkar as Independent Director on the agenda.
  • Change in designation for Ms. Lovely Ghanshyam Mutreja to be considered.
  • Remuneration of ₹1,82,325 per month for the Managing Director to be approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDSOYA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
